HOW_TO_USE_THIS_TRACKER: 1) Tap a project on the main screen to open its tasks.
2) On the Tasks screen you can see Task cards with Status, Owner, Reviewer, Priority, Deadline.
3) Tap a Task card to open Task Details.
4) Update Status and Comment right in Task Details.
5) Use “Add Update” inside the task to leave chat-style progress notes.
6) Add Dropbox links for files directly to the task.
7) New Task IDs follow the pattern TASK-XXX.
8) Owners deliver / change status; Reviewers approve or leave feedback.
9) Keep Tasks updated so automation and notifications work.
